overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character exploring a deserted industrial compound in a desert environment. The character walks through open paved areas, transitions to rocky terrain, passes through narrow passages between buildings, and crosses open fields with mountains visible in the background. The scene features utilitarian single-story buildings, a prominent multi-story orange apartment block, and electrical transmission towers under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial compound with single-story buildings and power infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through open paved area between low industrial buildings, heading toward the power transmission tower

entered.detail: tall metal lattice electrical tower with multiple cross-arms
low industrial buildings with flat roofs and small windows
circular satellite dish mounted on roof of distant building

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide-open industrial compound with asphalt ground. Single-story beige industrial buildings line both sides while a tall power transmission tower stands prominently ahead. The environment is deserted with clear blue skies and harsh midday shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky terrain approaching multi-story residential block

events.description: ground surface transitions from smooth asphalt to rocky dirt terrain

agents.ego_description: walking across rocky ground toward a large orange apartment building while passing single-story structures

entered.detail: four-story residential building with orange facade and multiple balconies
low brown stucco wall with small windows running parallel to the path

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts from paved asphalt to rocky dirt as the character approaches a large orange multi-story apartment building. The single-story industrial buildings recede into the background while an adobe wall appears on the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between apartment building and adobe wall

events.description: enters narrow passage between tall orange building and adobe wall structure

agents.ego_description: walking through confined passage between the orange apartment building and the adobe wall, heading toward open field

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a narrow passage between the large orange apartment building on the left and a textured adobe wall on the right. The space is confined with limited sky visibility, and the ground remains rocky and uneven.

scene_state.functional_zone: open field with scattered industrial buildings and power lines

events.description: exits narrow passage into wide open field with distant buildings visible
transitions from rocky field back onto paved asphalt surface

agents.ego_description: crossing open field toward distant industrial buildings, then stepping back onto paved area

entered.detail: cluster of single-story industrial structures and warehouses in the distance
multiple electrical transmission towers scattered across the landscape

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow passage into a vast open field with sparse vegetation and rocky ground. Distant industrial buildings and power transmission towers dot the horizon. The character continues walking across the field and eventually returns to a paved asphalt area near additional single-story buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a deserted industrial compound that transitions from wide paved areas into a confined corridor before opening back into a vast desert field. It begins on a wide stretch of asphalt flanked by beige industrial buildings, moving steadily toward a prominent power transmission tower under a clear blue sky. As the terrain shifts from pavement to rocky dirt, the camera approaches a large orange multi-story apartment building while an adobe wall emerges on the right. The scene then tightens as the character navigates a narrow, confined passage between the orange building and the textured wall, limiting the view of the sky. Finally, the camera emerges from the corridor into a vast open field of sparse vegetation and rocky ground, eventually returning to a paved area near distant industrial structures.
